title: Silver Ticket: Forged Kerberos Service Ticket
description: Detects forging of a Kerberos service ticket (silver ticket) using a captured service-account or computer-account hash via mimikatz kerberos::golden with a /service: and /target:, or Rubeus 'silver'. Unlike a golden ticket, it forges access to a single service without contacting the DC.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( (('Command Line' like '*kerberos::golden*' and 'Command Line' like '*/service:*')) and (('Command Line' like '*/target:*' or 'Command Line' like '*/rc4:*' or 'Command Line' like '*/aes256:*')) ) or (('Command Line' like '*rubeus silver*' or 'Command Line' like '*asktgs /service*')))
